top10_new_or_updated.title: 2nd UMZH Precision Digital Therapeutics Summer School, 17-21 August 2026, Zurich
top10_new_or_updated.description: Background Information What are Precision Digital Therapeutics (PDTx)? How are PDTx designed, evaluated, implemented, scaled, and reimbursed? How can Generative AI make PDTx highly personalized? Digital Therapeutics (DTx) are software-based interventions to manage and treat disease. Precision DTx (PDTx) deliver hyper-personalized interventions at the most relevant and opportune [...]

items.title: We're welcoming 4 new SIGCHI-sponsored conferences! ACM Interactive Health is for work at the intersection of HCI and Health. IH will be in Porto, Portugal, July 5 - 8. There will be an online pre-conference event on June 1 and registration for it is free. https://ih.acm.org/

items.title: Join our virtual Town Hall Preview on Mar 23, 7pm UTC!: https://sigchi.org/events/sigchi-town-hall-preview/. Given how much is in flux around us this year, this will be a space for members to raise concerns ahead of our annual town hall at CHI. We'll also get your input on initiatives we've been working on.

items.title: Following our Jan 2026 town hall to share feedback on the Digital Library (DL) with ACM, we invite members to read this CACM article on the evolution of the DL: https://cacm.acm.org/opinion/evolving-the-acm-digital-library/. The article lays out the rationale for changes, and further iteration that is underway.
